name: Old Fashioned Buttermilk Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a mixing bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
3. Add in the eggs, one at a time, then stir in the flour, buttermilk, and vanilla.
4. Pour the mixture into the pie shell.
5. Bake for about 1 hour and 45 minutes, or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
6. Allow to cool slightly before serving.
This recipe yields 8 servings, with each serving containing approximately 10 calories, 14 grams of fat, 92 milligrams of cholesterol, and 180 milligrams of sodium. The fat content makes up about 0.6% of the total calories in each serving.
